headline: Accenture Deepens Applied AI Push With Google Cloud Robotics And Security
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has expanded its AI partnership with Google Cloud through the Gemini Enterprise Acceleration Program, targeting large scale enterprise transformation with advanced AI models and pre built agents. The company is piloting humanoid robotics in warehouse logistics, applying physical AI in real world operations for enterprise clients. Accenture has joined an industry coalition led by CrowdStrike focused on addressing security vulnerabilities in code generated or influenced by...

headline: Accenture Stock: Oversold, Overlooked, and Still Building The AI Enterprise
summary: Accenture (ACN) stock has fallen over 30% the last twelve months, with its P/E multiple compressing from levels of over 22x to just about 15.3x. Yet, revenues still grew over 7% during that same period.

headline: CrowdStrike unveils coalition to tackle AI-driven software vulnerabilities
summary: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) announced the launch of Project QuiltWorks, a new coalition bringing together technology and consulting firms to address vulnerabilities in production code identified by artificial intelligence models. The initiative includes partners such as Accenture, Ernst & Young, IBM Cybersecurity Services, Kroll, and OpenAI.

headline: Is It Worth Investing in Accenture (ACN) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Accenture (ACN) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: CrowdStrike Launches Project QuiltWorks, Uniting the Cybersecurity Industry as Frontier AI Models Accelerate Risk
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, April 23, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today launched Project QuiltWorks, an industry-wide coalition of ecosystem partners to assess, prioritize, and continuously remediate the wave of vulnerabilities in production code now being discovered by frontier AI models. Project QuiltWorks includes Accenture, EY, IBM Cybersecurity Services, Kroll, OpenAI, CrowdStrike, and its broader partner ecosystem to help every organization answer the question their board is asking: are we exposed
